rules: slots is semantic content only — do not put x, y, w, h or style fields in slots
use only the keys listed under variant_keys for the chosen slide_variant
each bullet item: max 55 characters — longer text wraps and breaks the rendered layout
headline: max 45 characters — longer text overflows the title zone
body: max 90 characters — keep to 1 or 2 lines at 13pt
highlight: max 70 characters — must fit in the highlight card (approx 2.5 × 2.0 inches)
if elements is also present in the page, runtime renders elements and ignores slots

content_fit_guidance.why: The renderer places each slot value into a fixed-size text box. Text that exceeds the box is silently clipped in PowerPoint. Write concise, single-idea text per slot.
content_fit_guidance.headline: 1 line at 24pt. Max 45 chars. Prefer a noun phrase, not a full sentence.
content_fit_guidance.body: 1–2 lines at 13pt. Max 90 chars. One short sentence that sets context.
content_fit_guidance.eyebrow: 1 line at 14pt. Max 30 chars. Use a role label (e.g. 'Analysis', '해결 방안').
content_fit_guidance.bullets: 1 line each at 15pt. Max 55 chars per item. Start each with an action verb or key noun.
content_fit_guidance.left_points: Same rules as bullets. Keep items symmetric with right_points in length.
content_fit_guidance.right_points: Same rules as bullets. Keep items symmetric with left_points in length.
content_fit_guidance.highlight: 2–4 lines at 14pt bold. Max 70 chars total. One concise takeaway or insight.
content_fit_guidance.people: One name or title per item. Max 35 chars each.

example.headline: 피부 타입별 관리 포인트
example.body: 피부 타입에 따라 관리 우선순위가 달라집니다.
bullets: 건성 피부는 수분 유지와 장벽 보호가 중요합니다.
지성 피부는 피지 조절과 자극 완화가 핵심입니다.
복합성 피부는 부위별로 다른 관리가 필요합니다.
example.highlight: 같은 제품보다 맞는 관리 기준이 더 중요합니다.

optional_future_key.title_box_label: runtime supports it, but headline should stay the default prompt key
